lane.title: 05 PiSignage
lane.last_task: Load PiSignage creative-generation context for voice-driven offer workflow
lane.last_summary: Pulled current PiSignage lane memory, V2 choreography preview data, relocated upload packet, creative asset library, old HE creative-generation scripts, manual upload rules, live read-only PiSignage state, and updated ~/.codex/AGENTS.md timestamp. Confirmed execution scope should exclude PiSignage playlist/group/API mutation; owner will upload manually. Creative-generation truth: V2 choreography has 7 groups, 28 playlists, 113 listed assets, relocated packet under Documents/2026-05_Working-Files/Creative/HamzaExpress_TV_Copies_2026-05-16/_ORGANIZED_BY_TIMESLOT, vertical wall originals are 1080x1935 and must be exported as upload-ready rotated 1920x1080 files, horizontal facade/kitchen/first-floor files are native 1920x1080. ~/.codex/AGENTS.md was modified May 31 21:30 and includes the Wispr Flow voice-input working contract.
lane.next_action: Start a fresh PiSignage creative-generation chat so latest AGENTS.md auto-loads, then build a dynamic offer creative generator around closed dimensions: surface, time slot, offer type, hero dish, message role, TV position, aspect/export target, and manual-upload filename/playlist mapping.
